Tests division of positive infinity by zero in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code performs a single assertion to verify the behavior of dividing `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` by zero in JavaScript. The assertion checks that the result of this division is `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`, which is consistent with the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation to ensure that the JavaScript engine adheres to expected numerical behavior. It is likely used in a testing context to validate the correctness of the JavaScript implementation.
